commands.review_summary:
The PR adds exact-release ClawHub trust checks before plugin install/update downloads, acknowledgement plumbing, persisted trust metadata, docs, tests, and rebase compatibility fixes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is security/install-policy hardening rather than a bug report, and current main source shows ClawHub downloads happen without this trust gate.
